title: VibePlan
description: An AI-powered itinerary planner for Singapore that scrapes live social media data to recommend activities based on vibe, budget, and real-time trends.

title: MoneyGo
description: A cross-platform personal finance mobile app featuring AI receipt scanning, expense tracking, and data visualization.

title: Telegram GPT
description: A high-performance Telegram Bot that understands your conversations using persistent PostgreSQL-backed memory and sophisticated token-window optimization.

title: NotiflyMeBot
description: A Telegram reminder bot that uses Gemini AI & Duckling to parse natural language dates (e.g., 'tomorrow at 3pm') and schedules automated alerts.

title: NUS GPA Calculator
description: A rich academic tracking tool for NUS students to compute CAP/GPA, featuring CSV import/export, semester filtering, and local storage persistence.

title: Tze Foong's Timer
description: A URL-based timer and stopwatch application allowing instant configuration via URL paths with a clean, responsive Tailwind UI.

title: Heartfelt Support Bot
description: An anonymous Telegram bot connecting users with support members while maintaining complete privacy for both parties via masked identities.

title: Raffles Hall Confessions Bot
description: A Telegram bot facilitating anonymous confessions posted to a channel with public comment threads, managing user anonymity.
